name: ASHFORD HOSPIT.TRUST NEW
summary: Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on investing in upper upscale, full-service hotels. The company's portfolio includes hotels primarily operating under the Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt brands, and it is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. Ashford Hospitality Trust seeks to maximize shareholder value through strategic acquisitions, renovations, and operational improvements.
